candidates.title: Review unified approvals for stale or duplicate approval records
candidates.goal: Inspect UNIFIED_APPROVALS.json and propose a cleanup plan for stale or duplicate approval records without modifying source approval stores.
candidates.why: Approval visibility is now unified, but stale or duplicate records should be reviewed before more automation depends on the projection.

candidates.title: Audit relay reports for missing latest-state summaries
candidates.goal: Inspect relay reports and bridge telemetry to identify whether the latest operator-facing state summary is complete and current.
candidates.why: Self-continuation should only rely on current, scannable state before proposing the next cycle.

candidates.title: Draft scheduler registration readiness checklist
candidates.goal: Prepare a review-only readiness checklist for manual scheduler approval without registering, enabling, or starting any scheduled task.
candidates.why: Scheduler activation is gated and must remain operator-approved.
